description: Padmini Dayanika Panabokke Vs. Dissanayake Mudiyanselage Nilakshika Gunawardena and 6 Others before Hon.K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J
parties: Padmini Dayanika Panabokke Vs. Dissanayake Mudiyanselage Nilakshika Gunawardena and 6 Others
keywords: Appeal arising out of an order of a Provincial High Court in the exercise of the revisionary jurisdiction vested in it by Article 154P(3)(b) of the Constitution to be read with Article 138 thereof-Under what circumstances can an Appeal which is out of time be considered as an application in revision-Proof of exceptional circumstances
legistation: Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka, Article 154(3)(b).
